title: Query items returns updates null with API 2025-01
excerpt:
Hi all, 
I am using the above current API version with latest monday-sdk-js@0.5.6. It seems, that the content of updates (with limit 1) is null when querying items with the API. When I test the same query in the API play…

posts.author: nyxophyl (Marcus Stöckel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I am using the above current API version with latest monday-sdk-js@0.5.6. It seems, that the content of updates (with limit 1) is null when querying items with the API. When I test the same query in the API playground, the updates result has valid content. It also worked with older API version 2023-10 which is no longer usable. Is this maybe a bug or do I have to change anything? Thanks in advance.

Best regards, Marcus

posts.author: davide.monticelli (Davide)
posts.cookedHtml:
I think the 2025-01 are not fully released.
That’s my question on the forum:

Api 2025-01 are released or not? monday Apps & Developers
Could a moderator kindly answer the question? Thanks Davide

posts.author: nyxophyl (Marcus Stöckel)
posts.cookedHtml: I just found, that there are now separate permissions for updates. I set these at a new app version and it works again.
